name: luly-v0-2-0
description: Author Luly flows (academies, courses, marketing campaigns, waitlists, interactive proposals) end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2 collapses the 10-stage JSON pipeline into 5 stages of markdown context-passing. Ships 5 active skills + 2 optional review skills, plus assembler + parsers. Version-suffixed plugin name shows the loaded version in every Skill() call.
